attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ALLOW_PRICE_OVERRIDE_FLAG  
, MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            
, MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1                    
, MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2                    
, MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE3                  
, MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CANCEL_DATE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CANCEL_FLAG
,Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CANCEL_REASON,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e')  CANCEL_REASON
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CANCELLED_BY
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CAPITAL_EXPENSE_FLAG
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CATEGORY_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CLOSED_BY
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CLOSED_CODE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CLOSED_DATE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CLOSED_FLAG
,Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CLOSED_REASON,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e')  CLOSED_REASON
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CONTRACT_NUM
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CREATED_BY
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.CREATION_DATE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.EXPIRATION_DATE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.FROM_HEADER_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.FROM_LINE_ID
,Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e')  ITEM_DESCRIPTION
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ITEM_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ITEM_REVISION
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.LINE_NUM
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.LINE_TYPE_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.LIST_PRICE_PER_UNIT
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.MARKET_PRICE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.MIN_RELEASE_AMOUNT
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.NEGOTIATED_BY_PREPARER_FLAG
,Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_PO_LINES_ALL.NOTE_TO_VENDOR,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e')  NOTE_TO_VENDOR
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ORG_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.OVER_TOLERANCE_ERROR_FLAG
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.PO_HEADER_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.PO_LINE_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.PRICE_BREAK_LOOKUP_CODE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.PRICE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.QTY_RCV_TOLERANCE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.QUANTITY
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.TAX_CODE_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.TAXABLE_FLAG
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.TRANSACTION_REASON_CODE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.TYPE_1099
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.UN_NUMBER_ID
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.UNIT_MEAS_LOOKUP_CODE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.UNIT_PRICE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.UNORDERED_FLAG
,Replace(
Replace(
Replace(MF_PO_LINES_ALL.VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '),chr(234),'e')  VENDOR_PRODUCT_NUM
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME
, MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4
, MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE5
,MF_PO_LINES_ALL.ATTRIBUTE9
FROM
MF_PO_LINES_ALL
WHERE  MF_PO_LINES_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
